name: niconico-auto-set-language
description: Automatically set language to Japanese on NicoNico
author: PiesP

scripts.build:dev: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.quality: pnpm -s fmt && pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip && pnpm -s quality:nose
scripts.quality:fix: pnpm -s fmt:fix && pnpm -s lint:fix && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip
scripts.quality:ci: pnpm -s fmt && pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip && pnpm -s quality:nose
scripts.quality:nose: bash -c 'if command -v nose &>/dev/null; then nose query . --baseline .nose-baseline.json --fail-on new; else echo "[nose] not installed — skipping"; fi'
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.verify: pnpm -s quality && pnpm build && pnpm build:min
